inputs.label: Asset Cost
inputs.businessContext: Initial cost of the asset, including purchase price, installation, and delivery.

businessContext_i18n.en: Initial cost of the asset, including purchase price, installation, and delivery.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Varlığın satın alma fiyatı, kurulum ve nakliye dahil ilk maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anschaffungskosten des Vermögenswerts, einschließlich Kaufpreis, Installation und Lieferung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût initial de l'actif, incluant prix d'achat, installation et livraison.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo inicial del activo, incluyendo precio de compra, instalación y entrega.

inputs.label: Salvage Value
inputs.businessContext: Estimated residual value of the asset at the end of its useful life.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated residual value of the asset at the end of its useful life.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Varlığın faydalı ömrü sonunda tahmini kalıntı değeri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzter Restwert des Vermögenswerts am Ende seiner Nutzungsdauer.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur résiduelle estimée de l'actif à la fin de sa durée de vie utile.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor residual estimado del activo al final de su vida útil.

inputs.label: Useful Life
inputs.businessContext: Expected duration the asset will be productive, in years.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected duration the asset will be productive, in years.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Varlığın üretken olması beklenen süre, yıl cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete Nutzungsdauer des Vermögenswerts in Jahren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée prévue de productivité de l'actif, en années.
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración esperada durante la cual el activo será productivo, en años.

inputs.label: Years Elapsed
inputs.businessContext: Number of years the asset has been in use, used to compute accumulated depreciation and book value.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of years the asset has been in use, used to compute accumulated depreciation and book value.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Varlığın kullanımda olduğu yıl sayısı, birikmiş amortisman ve defter değerini hesaplamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Jahre, die der Vermögenswert genutzt wurde, zur Berechnung der kumulierten Abschreibung und des Buchwerts.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'années d'utilisation de l'actif, utilisé pour calculer l'amortissement cumulé et la valeur comptable.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de años que el activo ha estado en uso, utilizado para calcular la depreciación acumulada y el valor en libros.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
